title: erigeron bigelovii
intro: Erigeron bigelovii, also known as Bigelow's fleabane, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Erigeron bigelovii are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
